title: A Monke's Dream
description: Modpack, which aims to immerse and reward exploration, while keeping the game Vanilla firendly
body:
**Disclaimer:**

This modpack uses the **Big Globe** mod for world generation, which requires **certain data packs to use additional world generation mods**. Consequently, mods _like Better Nether_ are incompatible with this modpack. Due to the world generation settings, reworking the Nether with new biomes or mobs isn’t possible. _Terralith is also incompatible_, and _Amplified Nether_ has no effect. However, the Nether still reaches over _1000 blocks_ in height and features **unique structures**.

**Description:**

This modpack enhances **immersion** by improving _sounds_, _music_, and much more. **Exploration** is more rewarding with additional **biomes** and **structures**. Both the **Nether and the End** receive significant updates. The End now requires _12 unique Eyes of Ender_, crafted from various resources, to activate. New **animals** and **creatures** are also part of the experience. This modpack aims to deepen immersion and reward exploration while keeping the game as close to the vanilla Minecraft experience, as possible.

**More than just gameplay changes:**
The Modpack has also integrated multiplayer with the Essential Mod. Now it is easier to play with friends without a server for free.
Iris is uses to create shader support for any shader you may want to download.
_Disclaimer for shader "**iterationT 3.0.0**" this shader **does not**  support the Distant Horizons mod._

If you like this modpack, checkout my new and improved modpack [A Monke's Paradise](https://modrinth.com/modpack/a-monkes-paradise)
